Package com.chemaxon.clustering.wards

Ward's minimum variance implemented as a generic agglomerative hierarchical clustering algorithm.

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    LanceWilliamsMerge
    Instances represent a cluster distance update for agglomerative clusterings.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    LanceWilliamsAlgorithm
    Agglomerative hierarchical clustering implementation for Lance-Williams algorithm family.
    LanceWilliamsMerges
    Singleton instances of various cluster merge operations.
    LanceWilliamsMerges.AverageLinkage
    Average linkage clustering, also known as UPGMA.
    LanceWilliamsMerges.CompleteLinkage
    Complete linkage clustering, also known as farthest neighbor clustering.
    LanceWilliamsMerges.SingleLinkage
    Single linkage clustering also known as nearest neighbor clustering.
    LanceWilliamsMerges.Wards
    Ward's minimum variance clustering.

Package com.chemaxon.clustering.wards Description

Ward's minimum variance implemented as a generic agglomerative hierarchical clustering algorithm.

Please note that classes and interfaces in this package are marked with @Beta annotation, so they can be subject of incompatible changes or removal in later releases.

Author:
Gabor Imre
